asset_provenance.collision_strategy: visual landmark only; no generated mesh collision
asset_provenance.known_limitations: Mesh-only, not textured/PBR, not Blender-cleaned, not Unity-imported, not the hero rover asset.
asset_provenance.tool: TRELLIS-image-large mesh-only export; Three.js GLTFLoader runtime import

asset_provenance.collision_strategy: simple proxy box controlled by game state
asset_provenance.known_limitations: Not a generated GLB hero asset; Unity and Blender import are not claimed.

asset_provenance.collision_strategy: deterministic QA state transitions for gate validation
asset_provenance.known_limitations: No external mesh, texture, or material generation was used.
asset_provenance.tool: Three.js boxes, cylinder, and torus primitives

known_limitations: P1 now imports one AI-assisted mesh-only GLB workshop crate as a visual landmark, but the non-procedural hero rover asset pipeline remains a later asset-generation task.
The imported AI-assisted GLB is not used as gameplay collision; generated-mesh collision remains unproven and intentionally excluded.
The deterministic QA path uses the prototype's local __prototypeGate API to avoid brittle pointer-lock automation.
